notes.introduction: An exposition of Acts 13:1-12, with reference to Matthew 9:35-38, on the sending forth of Barnabas and Saul from the church at Antioch on the first missionary journey. The passage is read alongside the broader arc of Acts 1-14 to trace the spread of the gospel from Jerusalem to the uttermost parts of the earth.
